'''Loran''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived through the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and into the [[Rise of the Empire era]]. He became a resistance fighter and member of [[The Eleven]] after [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] reorganized the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] into his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He opposed to trying to rescue [[Ferus Olin]] right away when [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] came to the Eleven looking for him.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' {{1st}}
